_meta.provenance: chat-drafted; NOT master-canonical. Every DOI is real; every entry is ai_draft pending human review.
_meta.asset_split: lever nodes (group-agnostic) + per-marker read-constants. Relational wiring (which lever attaches to which group, member_effects) lives in marker_groups.json.
_meta.invariant_note: I1: every surfaced lever needs non-empty evidence_refs. Nodes with evidence_refs:[] are draft-only and MUST NOT surface until cited (see _deferred_levers).

testosterone_substrate_load.label: Testosterone substrate load
testosterone_substrate_load.mechanism_summary: The exogenous testosterone dose sets the substrate pool the HPG axis operates on; oestradiol tracks the aromatised fraction of that pool.

aromatase_inhibition.label: Aromatase inhibition
aromatase_inhibition.mechanism_summary: Pharmacologic aromatase inhibition lowers the T→E2 conversion rate, reducing serum oestradiol at a given substrate load.
aromatase_inhibition.grade_rationale: RCT/interventional evidence for AI effect on male serum E2.

aromatase_adiposity.label: Adiposity / aromatase activity
aromatase_adiposity.mechanism_summary: Adipose tissue is a primary aromatase site; body-fat change shifts peripheral T→E2 conversion.
aromatase_adiposity.grade_rationale: Observational + weight-loss evidence; downgraded for indirectness (populations differ) and imprecision.

alcohol.label: Alcohol intake
alcohol.mechanism_summary: Alcohol modulates hepatic oestrogen handling and (in the liver panel) raises GGT/AST; effect on male serum E2 is small and inconsistent.
alcohol.grade_rationale: Small, inconsistent observational effect on male serum E2; downgraded for imprecision and inconsistency.

exercise_muscle.label: Exercise / skeletal-muscle turnover
exercise_muscle.mechanism_summary: Training raises transaminases of skeletal-muscle origin; chronic pattern gives AST:ALT ≈ 1 and correlates with CK, distinguishing muscle from hepatocellular source.
exercise_muscle.grade_rationale: Consistent cohort evidence (chronic muscle → De Ritis ≈ 1) plus mechanistic CK correlation.

min_meaningful_delta.note: CVi ≈ 14% (Røys 2022). Assay-pin caveat: on immunoassay widen to ~0.50. Ahokoski 1998 gives ±38% consistent range.
EuBIVAS population RCV. Gilbert's inflates within-subject variance, so this is a FLOOR for a Gilbert's carrier, not a ceiling (#53 context case).

bilirubin_total.stable_rationale: Constitutional/benign (Gilbert's pattern): unconjugated, isolated, normal GGT, normal haemolysis_index/LD (no haemolysis). Persistent H flag is annotated, never treated as news.

min_meaningful_delta.note: CVi ≈ 15%. Citation pending — CVi source not yet pinned to a DOI.
AST CVi unverified — no authored delta. Module falls back to default until pinned.

min_meaningful_delta_fallback.note: Applied to any canonical marker with no authored min_meaningful_delta. Conservative placeholder — a crossed reference bound still triggers news regardless (contract gate 2).

hepatic_steatosis.reason: Competing lever for ALT (hepatic origin). Held out of live nodes: no real DOI to hand — I1 forbids surfacing an uncited lever. Add citation to promote.

plasma_volume_status.reason: Discriminates haemoconcentration (draw artefact) from true erythron expansion — plasma-based analytes rise with plasma contraction while MCV, being per-cell, does not. Held out of live nodes: sources identified but no DOI captured verbatim — I1 forbids surfacing an uncited lever. Add citation to promote.
